ddls:
CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "purchase_order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "purchase_order_document_id" INTEGER /* Document ID associated with the purchase order */,
  "purchase_order_date" TEXT /* Date the purchase order was created */,
  "purchase_order_fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the purchase order */,
  "purchase_order_period" TEXT /* Period of the purchase order (e.g., M1, M2, Q1, Q2) */,
  "business_unit_code" TEXT /* Code of the business unit making the purchase */,
  "supplier_account_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the supplier account */,
  "entered_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or department that entered the purchase order */,
  "purchase_order_amount_local" REAL /* Amount of the purchase order in the local currency */,
  "purchase_order_local_currency" TEXT /* Local currency of the purchase order amount */,
  "purchase_order_status" TEXT /* Status of the purchase order (e.g., Draft, Approved, Rejected, Cancelled) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the purchase order was approved */,
  "approval_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who approved the purchase order */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date for the delivery of the order */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date when the order was delivered */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the purchase order (e.g., Pending, Paid, Overdue) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the purchase order */,
  "audit_log" TEXT /* Audit logs for changes made to the purchase order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_business_unit_code FOREIGN KEY ("business_unit_code") REFERENCES business_units ("business_unit_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_purchase_order_local_currency FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_order_local_currency") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_approval_by FOREIGN KEY ("approval_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_entered_by FOREIGN KEY ("entered_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_supplier_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_account_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_units" (
  "business_unit_code" TEXT /* Code of the business unit */,
  "business_unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the business unit */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the business unit */,
  "fiscal_year_start" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year for the business unit */,
  "fiscal_year_end" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year for the business unit */,
  "budget_allocation" REAL /* Budget allocated for procurement for the fiscal year */,
  "budget_spent" REAL /* Amount of budget spent so far */,
  "budget_remaining" REAL /* Remaining budget for procurement */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person for the business unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_unit_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_account_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the supplier's website */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Supplier rating based on performance and reliability */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the supplier (e.g., Net 30, Net 60) */,
  "delivery_terms" TEXT /* Delivery terms agreed with the supplier (e.g., FOB, CIF) */,
  "last_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the last performance review of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Procurement Officer, Finance Manager, Auditor) */,
  "business_unit_code" TEXT /* Code of the business unit the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., Active, Inactive, Locked) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User permissions and roles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_business_unit_code FOREIGN KEY ("business_unit_code") REFERENCES business_units ("business_unit_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate of the currency to a base currency (e.g., USD) */,
  "base_currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the base currency used for exchange rate calculation */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the exchange rate */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the exchange rate data (e.g., Central Bank, Financial API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_code")
)
